title: AI-driven scaffold-hopping of Embelia ribes embelin yields a topical-friendly anti-fibrotic candidate (EMB-3): an in silico case study for skin scar regeneration
prior_history: ChemRxiv rejected 2026-04-30 (scope mismatch, curator letter); manuscript type expanded in v0.4 with REINVENT 4 + 7-compound SAR panel + ABFE protocol; resubmitted to bioRxiv 2026-05-03.
